description: Fichas base de criaturas/personajes para TTG artgen. Cada entrada describe un diseño original sin copiar franquicias existentes.

creatures.name: Lumipuff
creatures.pose: jumping forward with a playful smile

creatures.name: Bubblit
creatures.pose: spinning happily inside a water bubble

creatures.name: Emberkit
creatures.body: small feline with tufted ears and a flame-tipped tail
creatures.pose: pouncing forward with a flickering tail
creatures.background: warm gradient with floating ember sparks

creatures.name: Leafroll
creatures.body: round armadillo-like creature with leaf-patterned shell
creatures.pose: curled into a ball with one eye peeking out
creatures.background: simple forest floor with scattered leaves

creatures.name: Voltbud
creatures.body: small rodent with bright yellow fur and lightning bolt tail
creatures.pose: dashing in a zigzag with static sparks
creatures.background: abstract speed lines with electric sparks

creatures.name: Voltcrab-X
creatures.pose: low battle stance with both claws raised
creatures.background: dark digital grid with floating code fragments

creatures.name: Datadrake
features: wings made of holographic data streams
creatures.pose: gliding through cyberspace with wings spread
creatures.background: deep digital void with scrolling binary

creatures.name: Bytefang
creatures.body: wolf-like creature with pixelated edges and corrupted textures
creatures.pose: crouching ready to pounce with glitch trails
creatures.background: dark void with red glitch artifacts

creatures.name: Rai Kendo
creatures.pose: one arm forward releasing an emerald energy wave
creatures.background: dramatic aura burst with energy particles

creatures.name: Tenzan Blaze
creatures.body: tall lean fighter with wild spiky hair
creatures.pose: mid-air flying kick with fire trail behind leg

creatures.name: Mizu Shiro
creatures.body: graceful fighter with long flowing blue hair
creatures.pose: meditative stance with water spiraling around arms
creatures.background: serene waterfall with floating water droplets
